action.proof_term:
intro A N k g q hgA hqN hk hkAN hd hdiv
obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := hgA
obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := hqN
have hdAN : g * q ∣ A * N := by
  refine ⟨a * b, ?_⟩
  rw [ha, hb]
  ring
have hdk : g * q ∣ k := by
  have hsub : A * N - (A * N - k) = k := by omega
  rw [← hsub]
  exact Nat.dvd_sub hdAN hdiv
rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
exact le_trans (Nat.card_divisors_le_self (g * q))
  (Nat.le_of_dvd hk hdk)

intro A N k g q hgA hqN hk hkAN hd hdiv
obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := hgA
obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := hqN
have hdAN : g * q ∣ A * N := by
  refine ⟨a * b, ?_⟩
  rw [ha, hb]
  ring
have hdk : g * q ∣ k := by
  have hsub : A * N - (A * N - k) = k := by omega
  rw [← hsub]
  exact Nat.dvd_sub hdAN hdiv
rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
exact le_trans (Nat.card_divisors_le_self (g * q))
  (Nat.le_of_dvd hk hdk)

info.lean_statement:
∀ (A N k g q : ℕ),
      g ∣ A → q ∣ N → 0 < k → k ≤ A * N → 0 < g * q →
      g * q ∣ A * N - k →
      ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (g * q) ≤ k

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
